meta.description: Living beachhead-derived opportunity source registry. Nova reasons new sources in. Scout sweeps active ones. Never hardcoded — always reasoned from beachhead position, regulatory triggers, and capability unlocks.
meta.changelog: v1.1 -- Brave Search API key added to .env (BRAVE_SEARCH_API_KEY). All active_pending_api_key sources promoted to active. Open web tier now fully live across all 7 beachheads.

registry_reasoning_framework.question_1_regulatory_trigger: What new law, regulation, or mandate just created a compliance requirement or funding pool that KAI-Netics credentials can fulfill?
registry_reasoning_framework.question_2_follow_the_money: Who just got funded to buy what KAI-Netics sells? Follow appropriations, grant awards, capital budgets.
registry_reasoning_framework.question_3_vertical_expansion: What new use case does an emerging capability, certification, or regulation unlock?
registry_reasoning_framework.question_4_ecosystem_mapping: Who are the primes, buyers, and partners already operating in spaces KAI-Netics is entering? Their procurement surfaces are our surfaces.
registry_reasoning_framework.question_5_geography_activation: DMV is the core. What adjacent geographies activate as the platform scales, CAKO graduates deploy, and Part 135 is obtained?
registry_reasoning_framework.question_6_safer_skies_trigger: Safer Skies Act creates funded mandates for public safety drone programs. Which agencies in DMV receive funding and when do procurement cycles open?
registry_reasoning_framework.question_7_bvlos_unlock: Part 108 BVLOS final rule unlocks medical delivery, logistics corridors, and MONK as a compliance architecture. What new buyer categories activate the day it passes?
registry_reasoning_framework.question_8_3pl_expansion: 3PL drone logistics requires operators, aircraft, route authority, and trust layer. Which 3PL operators in DMV are positioned for drone logistics partnerships?

BH3_dfr_public_safety_safer_skies.beachhead: DFR / Public Safety / Safer Skies Act / C-UAS / Crowd Control
BH3_dfr_public_safety_safer_skies.status: ACTIVE — FEMA C-UAS $250M and UASI $553M already flowing

safer_skies_positioning.whitelist_redlist_advantage: Fleet 1 (Skydio + Freefly) and Fleet 2 (IF800 Tomcat) are NDAA compliant. Grant-funded agencies can only buy NDAA-compliant hardware. Sell the compliance pathway explicitly.
safer_skies_positioning.complete_program_sale: NDAA aircraft + CISSP-secured comms + CAKO operators + CONOPS + SOPs + privacy policy + FAA coordination + maintenance. Nobody else sells the full stack in DMV.
safer_skies_positioning.crowd_control_capability: AKMS swarm + DFR deployment + aerial monitoring = Safer Skies Act crowd control use case. Position explicitly.
unlock_events: Safer Skies Act passage = every DMV public safety agency becomes funded buyer
FIFA World Cup 2026 = event security RFP mid-2026

nova_reasoning_log.session: Beachhead architecture and source registry build
nova_reasoning_log.reasoning: Full 7-beachhead source registry built from first principles. Safer Skies Act underserved — whitelist/redlist fleet advantage added as explicit sales positioning. Crowd control and event security added as capabilities. Part 108 BVLOS identified as single unlock event for BH6 — FAA docket added as daily monitored signal. 3PL expansion framed as Phase 2 of BH2. USASpending.gov added to reverse-engineer buyer map.
nova_reasoning_log.key_insight: KAI-Netics is not a compliance consultant. It is a full-stack autonomous services platform.

nova_reasoning_log.reasoning: BRAVE_SEARCH_API_KEY configured in .env. All active_pending_api_key sources promoted to active. Open web tier fully live across all 7 beachheads and global signals. Perplexity Sonar remains pending.
